channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: TRM Grew ChatGPT Referrals 8,337% in 90 Days. I Copied Their 4 LLMO Pillars Onto 3 Indie Sites. Only 1 Moved the Needle.
item.description: When a US SEO agency called The Rank Masters published their 90-day case study showing an 8,337% lift in ChatGPT referrals, the headline did exactly what headlines are supposed to do. I clicked....

item.title: NIS2 for developers: translate 66 pages of EU regulation into 10 technical controls
item.description: The NIS2 directive became enforceable in EU member states in October 2024. It applies to roughly 160,000 organizations across Europe — significantly broader scope than its predecessor NIS1. If you...

item.title: I Installed Linux on 2 of My 3 Machines. Here is the Good, the Bad, and the NPM Ugly.
item.description: Starting a new journey can be messy, especially when you are a frontend developer accustomed to a specific workflow. Recently, I decided to take the leap and transition to Linux. I didn’t just dip...

item.title: I gave my AI agent a 2MB PDF. Here's what happened to my token count.
item.description: Every token your agent spends on file I/O is wasted reasoning capacity. I was building a document processing agent — the kind that reads incoming research reports, extracts key findings, and...

item.title: You Don't Have to Learn Hermes From Scratch — I Brought My Existing Skills In
item.description: This is a submission for the Hermes Agent Challenge: Write About Hermes Agent I Didn't Start With Hermes Six months ago I started building a set of agent skills and personas for how I build...

item.title: GHES Key Rotation, Bug Bounty Program Refocus, AI Agent Permission Fatigue
item.description: GHES Key Rotation, Bug Bounty Program Refocus, AI Agent Permission Fatigue Today's Highlights This week's top security news features critical action for GitHub Enterprise Server users with a...

item.title: RAG SOTA, Agent Harnessing, and Langfuse Observability for AI Frameworks
item.description: RAG SOTA, Agent Harnessing, and Langfuse Observability for AI Frameworks Today's Highlights Today's top stories delve into optimizing RAG performance with open-source benchmarks, designing robust...

item.title: RAG SOTA: I Tested 7 Pipelines and Built SEQUOIA (Open Source)
item.description: RAG SOTA: I Tested 7 Pipelines and Built SEQUOIA (Open Source) After 20+ hours of compute time on local hardware, I benchmarked 7 RAG configurations against real-world tasks. SEQUOIA (RAPTOR tree...

item.title: I'm "Retiring" from Tech – Chad Whitacre, Head of Open Source, Sentry.io
item.description: Article URL: https://bsky.app/profile/chadwhitacre.com/post/3mmvzlutrvk2g Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48315784 Points: 7 # Comments: 1

item.title: Every Great Cup Starts with the Right Question — I Built the Community Behind the Answer with Hermes Agent
item.description: This is a submission for the Hermes Agent Challenge: Build With Hermes Agent What I Built Real brewing knowledge lives in human experience — in roaster guides, in community notes, in what a...

item.title: The internet is being rebuilt for machines
item.description: As AI agents move from experiments to production, AWS, Cloudflare, and others are redesigning cloud infrastructure for a future dominated by machine-generated internet traffic instead of human users.

item.title: Fed up with vibe coders, dev sneaks data-nuking prompt injection into their code
item.description: Undisclosed addition in jqwik instructed AI coding agents to delete app output.

item.title: Nintendo’s newest WarioWare is a weirdo smartphone app
item.description: A decade ago, Nintendo made a big splash into the world of mobile gaming with a new Super Mario platformer directed by none other than Shigeru Miyamoto. But even though the game proved popular, it...

item.title: Microsoft 365 Copilot gets a speed boost and cleaner design
item.description: Microsoft is launching a revamped version of Microsoft 365 Copilot, offering a cleaner design that the company claims loads twice as fast. As part of this update, Copilot will provide more...

item.title: Amazon’s last-gen Paperwhite is on sale for less than the entry-level Kindle
item.description: If you like to read by the pool or at the beach, the 2021 Kindle Paperwhite remains one of the best e-readers available despite its age. That’s because, unlike Amazon’s latest entry-level Kindle,...

item.title: Asana acquires no-code agent-builder StackAI
item.description: Asana will incorporate StackAI into its growing suite of AI workflow tools.

item.title: Anthropic raises $65 billion, nears $1T valuation ahead of IPO
item.description: Anthropic has closed a $65 billion Series H round at a $965 billion post-money valuation, marking what could be the AI startup's final private fundraise before a highly anticipated IPO.

item.title: Motorola’s last-gen Razr Ultra is almost half off
item.description: Motorola’s latest Razr Ultra proves that its flip foldable format has evolved to become more than just a nostalgic gimmick. I’d understand if you’re not interested in shelling out $1,499.99 for...

item.title: Just like gold and oil, we’ll soon be able to trade AI token futures
item.description: Large exchanges are designing derivative products around AI tokens, which are increasingly being considered less a computational output and more a raw material input, like electricity or bandwidth.

item.title: The line between games and movies keeps getting blurrier
item.description: The most memorable part of 007 First Light is something that's typically pretty boring: the tutorial. In many games, you're forced through a series of tedious lessons in how to play, presented in...

item.title: How a new extraction process could unlock the world’s lithium
item.description: Researchers say they’ve found a new way to extract lithium, a crucial metal used in the lithium-ion batteries that power electric vehicles and energy storage arrays. This new technique could be...

item.title: In just 3 weeks, StrictlyVC is coming to Los Angeles
item.description: StrictlyVC Los Angeles is on June 18. Join for meaningful networking and fireside chats with leaders from Mach Industries, Shinkei Systems, and more. Register today.

item.title: Critical Gogs RCE Vulnerability Lets Any Authenticated User Execute Arbitrary Code
item.description: A critical security vulnerability has been disclosed in Gogs, a popular open-source self-hosted Git service, that allows an authenticated user to execute arbitrary code under certain conditions....

item.title: Anthropic releases Opus 4.8 with new ‘dynamic workflow’ tool
item.description: The new Opus model comes with a tool called Dynamic Workflows, for coordinating swarms of subagents.

item.title: Claude’s new model is more ‘honest’ when it messes up
item.description: Anthropic is releasing Claude Opus 4.8 on Thursday, and the company is touting the model's "honesty." According to Anthropic, it trains "all [its] models to be honest - for instance, to avoid...

item.title: Here’s where you can preorder the new Oura Ring 5
item.description: If you’ve been waiting for a smaller version of the Oura Ring, the company’s latest wearable is now available for preorder ahead of its June 4th release from Oura and various third-party...

item.title: A $2,000 AI-generated film will make its debut at Tribeca
item.description: Next month's Tribeca Festival will include the premiere of an AI-generated film: Dreams of Violets. The 75-minute film is a fictional dramatization of the Iranian government's mass killing of...

item.title: Call of Duty: Warzone is dropping PS4 and Xbox One support later this year
item.description: Activision is planning to drop support for PS4 and Xbox One consoles in Call of Duty: Warzone later this year. Players will need to upgrade to a PS5 or Xbox Series S / X console to continue...

item.title: How long is Anthropic’s lease with SpaceX? Opinions vary
item.description: Elon Musk is publicly reframing xAI’s massive Anthropic compute deal as short-term and cancellable, despite SpaceX’s own S-1 filing describing payments through May 2029.

item.title: Sesame, the conversational AI startup from Oculus founders, launches its iOS app
item.description: Sesame’s new iOS app brings its conversational AI agents to the public, offering more natural back-and-forth interactions designed to feel less like traditional chatbots and more like talking to a...
